title: Stelis bordoncillensis
intro: Stelis bordoncillensis, also known as the Bordoncillensis orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its delicate white flowers and slender stem. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and boost the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Stelis bordoncillensis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Stelis bordoncillensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create a tea or tincture.
